title: Sindhu Wins Japan Open with Scorching Victory Over Home Contender Akane Yamaguchi
indian_angle: PV Sindhu's triumph marks a significant return to form for the Indian badminton star, securing a major title against a top opponent.
summary: PV Sindhu clinched the Japan Open title with a dominant performance against local favorite Akane Yamaguchi, ending a period of struggle and reaffirming her status among the elite.

title: Reengineered to Win: Inside Sindhu’s Radical, Data-Driven Comeback
indian_angle: This article details the scientific approach and hard work behind PV Sindhu's recent resurgence, offering insight into her training and strategy.
summary: Sports scientist Wayne Lombard breaks down the meticulous, data-driven process that helped India’s badminton stalwart PV Sindhu regain her top game and achieve her recent Japan Open victory.

title: How a Cryptic Virat Kohli Remark Sparked PV Sindhu’s Revival on the Court
indian_angle: An intriguing look into the motivational factor from another Indian sporting icon that contributed to PV Sindhu's return to winning ways.
summary: A cryptic remark from cricket star Virat Kohli is revealed to have played a pivotal role in inspiring PV Sindhu's recent comeback and success on the badminton court.

title: ‘She Can Beat Top Players’: Pullela Gopichand on New-Found Surge of PV Sindhu
indian_angle: National coach Pullela Gopichand's endorsement highlights the significance of PV Sindhu's improved form for Indian badminton's future prospects.
summary: Pullela Gopichand expresses confidence in PV Sindhu's renewed form, stating that she has the capability to defeat top players, a crucial assessment following her recent performances.

title: World Championships in Delhi: Why Badminton Needs Gen Z, Gen Alpha Watchers
indian_angle: This article discusses the future of badminton viewership in India, focusing on engaging younger generations for the upcoming World Championships in Delhi.
summary: As the World Championships head to Delhi, there's a growing discussion on how to attract younger audiences, Gen Z and Gen Alpha, to ensure the sport's continued popularity in India.

title: Badminton’s 3x15 Scoring for All Domestic Tournaments, to Debut at Ernakulam
indian_angle: A significant rule change for domestic badminton in India, this new scoring format aims to impact player strategy and game dynamics nationwide.
summary: The Badminton Association of India announces a new 3x15 scoring format for all domestic tournaments, set to debut at an event in Ernakulam.
